action: In Google Chrome on the computer, go to the website https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/category/buy-stocks and manually browse to collect the latest information about the best stocks to buy in India. Summarize the key points based on the displayed content.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer
